name: 2026.13.10 (Plus 10)
body:
## SourceGit Plus v2026.13.10 (Plus 10)

**Fixes**
* Removed the duplicated native title bar overlay from the previous Windows decoration change.
* Windows caption buttons now use native Win32 caption roles for normal release behavior and shell animations.

Download: https://github.com/kkkyloo/sourcegit_plus/releases/latest

---
Upstream: https://github.com/sourcegit-scm/sourcegit/releases/tag/v2026.13
